hero.description: Upload your company's financial documents — balance sheets and income statements — and receive in minutes a complete professional analysis with concrete improvement recommendations.

how.title: Three steps to a complete diagnosis

steps.title: Upload your documents
steps.desc: Upload balance sheets and income statements in PDF format for 2 or more years. The process is secure and confidential.

steps.title: AI analyses everything
steps.desc: Our artificial intelligence reads and interprets all documents, calculating ratios, identifying trends and comparing periods.

steps.title: Access the full report
steps.desc: After payment confirmation, you immediately access the detailed report with indicators, critical points and an action plan.

aiPrompt.role: You are a senior financial analyst specialised in European companies.
aiPrompt.instruction: Analyse ALL financial documents provided for the company "{{company}}" (years: {{years}}).
aiPrompt.sections:
Produce a complete and detailed financial analysis with the following sections:

1. GLOBAL RATING (one word: Excellent, Good, Acceptable, Concerning or Critical)

2. EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
Summary text of 3-4 sentences. Then a list of 4-5 key highlights.

3. FINANCIAL DATA (numerical values per year):
Revenue, Net profit, EBITDA, Total assets, Equity, Financial debt, Working capital.

4. INDICATORS & RATIOS (values per year):
Current Ratio, Quick Ratio, Financial Autonomy (%), ROE (%), ROA (%), Net Margin (%), EBITDA Margin (%), Debt/EBITDA (x), DSO (days), DPO (days).

5. DETAILED ANALYSIS
Four paragraphs on: Profitability, Liquidity and Solvency, Capital Structure, Operational Efficiency.

6. STRENGTHS & WEAKNESSES
List of strengths, weaknesses, opportunities and risks.

7. RECOMMENDATIONS
Immediate actions (0-3 months), medium term (3-12 months), long term (1-3 years).

8. CONCLUSION
Final paragraph with outlook.

Be specific with numbers and year-on-year comparisons.
aiPrompt.caeInstruction: The company has CAE {{cae}} — {{sector}}. Mandatorily include a section '08 — Sector Positioning' comparing the company's main financial indicators with average/median values for the sector in Portugal (source: Banco de Portugal, Central de Balanços). For each indicator (current ratio, financial autonomy, ROE, ROA, net margin, EBITDA margin, debt/EBITDA, DSO, DPO) state: company value, sector average, and whether the company is above or below the sector average. Use the most recent available Banco de Portugal data for the corresponding CAE sector.

s01.title: Service Provider
s01.body: The YourCFO service, accessible at yourcfo.app, is operated by Arrojo & Destreza Lda., VAT 517 674 670, Rua do Matim, 130, 4450-736 Matosinhos, Portugal. Email: info@yourcfo.app

s02.title: Scope and Purpose
s02.body: These Terms and Conditions govern access to and use of the YourCFO platform, which provides automated financial analysis services using artificial intelligence. The service is intended exclusively for legal entities and self-employed professionals. Use of the platform implies full acceptance of these Terms and Conditions.

s03.title: Description of Service
s03.body: The YourCFO platform allows users to upload financial documents in PDF format, obtain automated AI-powered financial analysis, and access a report with indicators, ratios, SWOT analysis and recommendations. Standard Plan: €79 (VAT included). Premium Plan: €149 (VAT included). The report is made available immediately after payment confirmation.

s04.title: Payment Process
s04.body: Payment is processed by credit/debit card (Stripe Payments Europe, Ltd.) or MB WAY (ifthenpay, Lda.). Arrojo & Destreza Lda. does not store card data. An invoice is issued after confirmed payment in accordance with Portuguese tax legislation.

s05.title: Refund Policy
s05.body: No refunds are made after delivery of the report, as the service is provided immediately and in full at the time of payment, except in cases of error attributable to Arrojo & Destreza Lda. or proven technical failure. Complaints: info@yourcfo.app within 48 hours.

s06.title: Nature and Limitations of Analysis
s06.body: The report is informational and for decision-support purposes only, and does not constitute financial, accounting, tax or legal advice. The quality of the analysis depends on the documents provided. Arrojo & Destreza Lda. is not responsible for business decisions made based on the report.

s07.title: Intellectual Property
s07.body: The report is for the exclusive use of the paying user. Reproduction or commercialisation without express authorisation from Arrojo & Destreza Lda. is prohibited.

s08.title: Liability
s08.body: Arrojo & Destreza Lda. is not liable for damages resulting from inability to use the platform, inaccuracies due to incorrect documents provided, or decisions made based on the report.

s09.title: Applicable Law
s09.body: Governed by Portuguese law. Jurisdiction of Matosinhos courts. Online dispute resolution: ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr.

s10.title: Amendments
s10.body: Arrojo & Destreza Lda. reserves the right to update these Terms at any time. Changes take effect upon publication at yourcfo.app.

s01.title: Data Controller
s01.body: Arrojo & Destreza Lda., VAT 517 674 670, Rua do Matim, 130, 4450-736 Matosinhos, Portugal. Email: info@yourcfo.app

s02.title: Data Collected
s02.body: Billing data: name/company, VAT number, address, email. Usage data: Google Analytics (browsing, anonymised IP). Financial documents: processed solely for report generation, not stored permanently.

s03.title: Purpose and Legal Basis
s03.body: Service performance — contract execution (Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR). Invoice issuance — legal obligation (Art. 6(1)(c) GDPR). Statistical analysis — legitimate interest via Google Analytics (Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR).

s04.title: Data Recipients
s04.body: Stripe (card payments), ifthenpay (MB WAY), weoInvoice (invoicing), Google LLC (Drive and Analytics), Anthropic PBC (AI), Cloudflare Inc. (infrastructure). We do not sell data to third parties for commercial purposes.

s05.title: Data Retention
s05.body: Billing data: 10 years (legal obligation). Report copies (Google Drive): period necessary for service. Browsing data (Analytics): 26 months.

s06.title: Cookies
s06.body: Necessary cookies: technical operation (Stripe, Cloudflare). Analytical cookies: Google Analytics — require consent. Manage preferences in browser settings.

s07.title: Your Rights
s07.body: Rights of access, rectification, erasure, restriction, portability and objection. Contact info@yourcfo.app (response within 30 days). Complaints to the supervisory authority.

s08.title: Security
s08.body: HTTPS/TLS encrypted transmission. Payments processed by PCI-DSS certified entities. Restricted data access.

s09.title: Contact
s09.body: info@yourcfo.app · Rua do Matim, 130, 4450-736 Matosinhos, Portugal. We guarantee a response within 30 working days.
